Web Page Description: This map shows fine particle pollution from wildfires and other sources. It does not show air toxics or other pollutants.
1.1.1 Non-text Content: The map has no apparent text alternative. The highcharts in the "Locations" section have no apparent text alternative. Some images do not have sufficient alt text, including: the icons and "icons used" graphics in the legend.  QC - The "Icons Used" section appears to be one graphic with one alternative text.   The alternative text is not sufficient to describe the individual icons and does not include the displayed text.
1.3.1 Info and Relationships: In the "About This Map" and "Map Settings" sections, the programmatic heading levels do not logically match the visual heading presentation within the heading structure. The "About This Map" heading is an h5 while its subsections are h2s. A similar issue exists in the location popup when clicking on a node on the map, and in the initial modal that appears when loading the page. The buttons for "About this Map", "Location", and "Map Settings" at the top right do not have an accessible name. The checkbox switches in the "Map Settings" section do not have accessible names.
1.4.1 Use of Color: Some of the map icons rely on color as the only visual means of conveying information.
1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum): The text in the map legend for "Unhealthy, 151-200" does not meet minimum AA contrast ratio (4.5:1).
1.4.5 Images of Text: In the legend, the "Icons used" graphic is an image of text.
2.1.1 Keyboard: The map icons can not be accessed using the keyboard.
2.4.7 Focus Visible: Several elements do not show a visible indication of focus. Examples: elements in the popup that appears when clicking on a map node and the refresh button on the map.
3.1.2 Language of Parts:
The text for English/Español are not identified with lang attributes depending on the page language.
QC - the "lang" attribute is set at the page level.   There should be a starting lang="es" and and ending lang = "en" on the "Espanol" label on the English page and a starting lang="en" and and ending lang="es" on the Spanish page to have the slider control labels read correctly.
Web Page Description.1: Home page for AirNow App. Get air quality data where you live.
1.1.1 Non-text Content.1:
The EPA logo icon alt text does not specify that it is a logo. Some decorative images have alt text, such as the globe, fire, calendar, and camera icons.
QC - Some icons like the globe are part of a control and are not separately accessed in the tab order.  The alt text will only be read on say-all or arrow navigation.  For icons/graphics that are decorative alt=" " will remove them from any reading.
1.3.1 Info and Relationships.1: The search field in the navigation menu does not have a programmatic label.
1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum).1: Some text does not meet minimum AA contrast ratio (4.5:1). Examples: the label in the zip code search field, the text in the legend for "Unhealthy for Sensitive Groups (USG)" and "Unhealthy
2.1.1 Keyboard.1: Some elements can not be accessed or executed with the keyboard. Examples: some of the navigation menu items and sub menus. It is sometimes not possible to execute the "System Alerts" button with the keyboard.
2.4.2 Page Titled.1: The page title does not identify the contents or purpose of the web page.
2.4.3 Focus Order.1: The focus order does not preserve the meaning and operability of the web page. Example: the EPA logo and "PARTNERS" are focused before the zip code search bar, the social media icons are focused from right to left
2.4.7 Focus Visible.1: Some elements do not provide a visible indication of focus. Examples: the skip to main content link, the links under the "Explore" heading
3.1.2 Language of Parts.1:
The text "Español" does not include a lang attribute.
QC - the "lang" attribute is set at the page level.   There should be a starting lang="es" and and ending lang = "en" on the "Espanol Beta" label on the English page and a starting lang="en" and and ending lang="es" on the "English" label on the Spanish page to have the control labels read correctly.
3.3.2 Labels or Instructions.1: The zip code field that appears when scrolling down the page does not have a visual label.

1.1.1 Non-text Content.3:
The decorative images in the three cards should not contain alt text. In the "Feedback Survey" modal, the stars should have alt text.
QC - The content of the three cards is not set up for routine access in the tab order other than for the link on each card.   The rest of the contents is only accessed and read by a screen reader on say-all and arrow navigation.  If the images are truly decorative they can be set to alt=" " which will remove them from any reading.  The additional text above the links should be included with the link text via aria-labelledby for completeness.
1.3.1 Info and Relationships.3: The items listed in the "EPA News Releases" section should not be heading elements. In the "Feedback Survey" modal, the text "Required Questions - page 1 of 2" and "Optional questions - page 2 of 2" should be heading elements.

If the images are truly decorative they can be set to alt=" " which will remove them from any reading.  The additional text above the links should be included with the link text via aria-labelledby for completeness.
1.3.1 Info and Relationships.4: The items in the side bar should not be heading elements.
1.4.3 Contrast (Minimum).4: The red error text and red asterisks do not meet minimum AA contrast ratio (4.5:1).
2.4.7 Focus Visible.4: There is no visible indication when focused on the skip links at the beginning of the tab order.
3.1.2 Language of Parts.4:
